scripts.start: concurrently -k -n api,panel -c blue,green "npm run start:api" "npm run start:panel"
scripts.start:api: sh -c 'MAIL_PROVIDER=${MAIL_PROVIDER:-noop} RESEND_API_KEY=${RESEND_API_KEY:-dummy} npm --prefix admin-api run dev:clean'
scripts.build: npm --prefix admin-api run build && npm --prefix admin-panel run build
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix admin-api install && npm --prefix admin-panel install
